title: Values
content:
Since there is excitement
    In suffering for a woman,
    Let him burn on.
    The dust in a wolf's eyes
    Is balm of flowers to the wolf
    When a flock of sheep has raised it.

    From the Arabic.
meaning:
Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Values"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
